media.name: Ca/Mg-HEPES buffer with Pseudomonas sp. prey (predation batch) (PMC12229818)
media.base_medium_reference: Full composition stated verbatim in this paper's Materials and Methods (PMC12229818). The buffer is the standard Ca/HEPES Bdellovibrio predation buffer (25 mM HEPES, 2 mM CaCl2, pH 7.6; e.g. Lambert C. & Sockett R.E., and Lambert et al. 2006 Appl Environ Microbiol 72:6757-6765, PMID:17021229), here additionally supplemented with 3 mM MgCl2.
media.verification_evidence: "Ca/Mg-HEPES buffer (25 mM HEPES, 2 mM CaCl2, 3 mM MgCl2, pH 7.6)". Used for Pseudomonas sp. prey + B. bacteriovorus predation batches; all cultures aerobic at 30 degC.
media.citation: Medium composition from PMC12229818 (see GrowthDB record).
